activities.title: Dehydrate 附件 After Read
activities.description: Post-助手-completion hook collapses image 附件ref parts 到 文字 annotation + filesystem-staged binary (C1, DD-1, DD-3, DD-5).

activities.title: Reread Staged Binary
activities.description: 工具 exposing IncomingStore.get 到 模型; 返回 fresh image content 區塊 (C3, DD-9).

activities.title: Serialize Dehydrated stub 到 Wire
activities.description: 訊息v2.到模型messages branches 在 dehydrated=true → 發出 文字 區塊 instead 的 imageurl (C4, DD-8).

arrows.label: 助手 訊息 使用 完成=stop
DD-3 always-dehydrate policy + DD-10 skip-在-failed-回合 rule
rewritten 附件ref part 使用 dehydrated=true + annotation; binary moved
模型 工具 呼叫 reread附件(filename)
fresh image content 區塊 OR 附件expired 錯誤
訊息v2 conversation messages 清單
模型訊息[] 供 AI SDK; dehydrated parts 作為 文字 區塊

activities.title: 取出 Annotation
activities.description: Pure function over 助手 回應 文字 → trimmed annotation ≤ 4000 chars (head + tail truncation if longer). C6, DD-12.

activities.title: Rewrite 附件 Part
activities.description: Session.更新part 使用 dehydrated=true, annotation, sha256, incoming路徑. Idempotent guard 透過 dehydrated check (DD-5).

arrows.label: 助手 回應 文字
DD-5 idempotency: skip if part already has dehydrated=true
rewritten 附件ref part persisted 到 Session 儲存

validation_notes: Each activity has at least one input arrow + one output arrow per IDEF0 §5 ICOM rules.
ModuleRefs in grafcet.json reference these activity IDs.
_recalibrationNote_v2_2026-05-04: A2 (Stage Binary On Disk) and A5 (Garbage Collect) removed. attachment-lifecycle no longer writes binaries; binary lifecycle owned by repo-incoming-attachments.
